sections.title: University of Michigan
sections.description: PhD and catalysis-focused research at the interface of chemical engineering and AI.

projects.title: Uncertainty-Aware Catalyst Search and Discovery
projects.period: Goldsmith Lab | University of Michigan | May 2022 - Aug 2022
projects.summary: Studied calibration-aware uncertainty quantification for adsorption-energy prediction on alloy catalysts using OC20 data.

sections.title: Amazon
sections.description: Applied ML for logistics forecasting, pre-training, and cost estimation.

projects.title: Unsupervised Package Representation Pre-Training
projects.summary: Designed a next-state pre-training objective for package trajectories to improve multiple downstream logistics tasks.

projects.title: First-Mile Package Demand Forecasting
projects.summary: Built forecasting models for pickup planning and routing across temporal and geographic granularities.

projects.title: RCTransformer for Shipping Cost Prediction
projects.period: Amazon Applied Scientist Intern | Jan 2023 - Jul 2023
projects.summary: Created a transformer architecture for package route plans and rate-card-informed last-mile shipping cost estimation.

sections.title: Summer Research
sections.description: Research internships focused on scientific machine learning and automated discovery.

projects.title: Self-Supervised Pre-Training for PDE Solvers
projects.period: Electrochemical Energy Group | Carnegie Mellon University | Jan 2023 - Oct 2023
projects.summary: Developed a foundational neural PDE solver using trajectory chunking and autoregressive transformer modeling.

projects.title: AI Poincare: Machine Learning Conservation Laws
projects.summary: Built methods to automatically discover numerical and symbolic conservation laws from governing differential equations.

sections.title: IIT Kharagpur Theses
sections.description: Undergraduate and masters thesis projects connecting simulation and machine learning.

projects.title: ML Surrogates for Pandemic Agent-Based Simulators
projects.period: IIT Kharagpur Bachelor Thesis | Aug 2021 - Apr 2022
projects.summary: Designed a machine-learning surrogate for intervention-policy simulation with substantial speedups over full ABM execution.

projects.title: Pattern Recognition in Polyelectrolyte Adsorption
projects.period: IIT Kharagpur Master Thesis | Aug 2022 - Apr 2023
projects.summary: Used molecular dynamics simulations to analyze adsorption behavior on patterned charged surfaces.

sections.title: Other Projects
sections.description: Additional applied work in NLP, retrieval, and argument mining.

projects.title: Reducing Call Wrap Time with NLP
projects.period: Prodigal ML Engineer Intern | Aug 2023 - Dec 2023
projects.summary: Fine-tuned LLM workflows to automate call summarization and issue extraction for customer-support operations.

projects.title: Domain-Specific QA with RAG
projects.summary: Led development of a CPU-efficient question-answering system combining retrieval and encoder-based ranking.

projects.title: Key Point Matching in Debates
projects.period: EMNLP Argument Mining Shared Task | Aug 2021
projects.summary: Built a sentence-overlap modeling pipeline using DeBERTa for key point matching in argument mining.
